You can disable auto-login in the General settings now, or when logging in (don't know why you would)
Added custom highlight keywords, check it out in the Options menu -> Notifications
Ctrl + Tab or Ctrl + Right arrow: Cycle to next channel
Ctrl + Shift + Tab or Ctrl + Left arrow: Cycle to previous channel
Added ability to open the latest changelog through the General settings. Changelog history coming in a later version
Fixed a bug where usernames with spaces would not show up in the correct teams for TeamVS
Fixed a bug where channel names would get cut off and the X would be hidden
Fixed a bug where an empty error would be displayed when closing channels
Fixed a bug where you would hear a notification sound for all messages
Fixed a bug when closing a channel and receiving a message after closing it, it would reopen that tab with that message even though you left the channel
